name: The Legacy User
effect: Resist all migration efforts through accumulated procedural knowledge. This card is considered indispensable.

clauses.name: UNDOCUMENTED WORKAROUND CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a critical process depends on this card: The process cannot be explained to anyone else.

clauses.name: CHANGE RESISTANCE PROTECTION
clauses.rule: When a modernization initiative targets this card: The initiative is delayed by one turn while stakeholders are reassured.

clauses.name: TRIBAL KNOWLEDGE EFFECT
clauses.rule: If this card is retired: Three previously invisible dependencies become blocking issues immediately.

witness_quote: Karen's the only one who knows.
